case_title: DIANA BROWN VS. LOUIS VUITTON - UNION SQUARE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, DIANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-21-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIANA BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOUIS VUITTON-UNION SQUARE IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE OCT-15-2019 HEARING THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PORR OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-03-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIS VUITTON - UNION SQUARE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY BROWN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIS VUITTON - UNION SQUARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIS VUITTON - UNION SQUARE
